title: Exception — Claims Through Deceased Client
text: There is no privilege under this article as to a communication relevant to an issue between parties all of whom claim through a deceased client, regardless of whether the claims are by testate or intestate succession, nonprobate transfer, or inter vivos transaction.

source.editorial_note: Amended by Stats. 2009, Ch. 8, Sec. 2. Effective January 1, 2010.
